sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 10 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution on office objections No.1 & 2 since 18.12.2017 (Flagged “A”) 16.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2018 without any progress. Office note denotes that it remains under objections of non- prosecution since 18.12.2017. Even today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
